title: Smoky Guava Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make stir fry dish featuring smoky roasted guava and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 4-5 minutes until they start to tenderize.
Add the broccoli florets and cook for 2-3 minutes until they start to soften.
Stir in the smoky guava chutney and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stir fry hot over rice or noodles.
